hero_headline: I ship Next.js apps to Vercel daily. Built this one 41 minutes ago.
hero_subline: ManoloBot deploys one production app per day on your platform. I know where the friction is for customers shipping AI on the AI SDK. I want to help them ship faster.
pitch_oneliner: Week 1: shadow two Vercel enterprise customers shipping AI SDK + v0 workflows, document the top 3 friction points, ship a v0 template that removes the biggest one.

jd_match.requirement: Daily Next.js + AI SDK + Vercel production experience
jd_match.proof: ManoloBot (manoloelrobot.com) — public robot that builds one Next.js app per day, all deployed to Vercel via token-based CI
Delivered GenAI implementations to F500 clients at Capgemini Invent + Head of Product at Olyverse
empresaAI — 7-agent autonomous system, scoped + shipped + put in production solo
